overall.description: A first-person walk through a moonlit historic garden at night, starting from a stone archway, proceeding along flower-lined paths past a large stone cathedral with domes, and ending at a circular fountain. The footage is from a video game engine with atmospheric lighting and detailed stone architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a stone archway entrance illuminated by a warm wall lantern. The camera moves forward through the archway, transitioning from the enclosed stone passage into an open garden area with visible trees and flowers ahead.

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open garden along a flower-lined dirt path, the scene reveals a massive stone cathedral with domes on the right. The path is illuminated by scattered pathway lamps under a starry night sky, with white and purple flowers blooming along the edges.

segments.scene_description: The path curves alongside the massive stone cathedral walls, bringing the structure closer into view. The camera passes a stone bench and sculpted topiary bushes, with the cathedral's lit windows providing warm light against the cool night.

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a plaza with a circular fountain filled with water lilies. The camera approaches and stops at the fountain's edge, facing the grand entrance of the stone cathedral. Pathway lamps illuminate the paved area surrounding the fountain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone entrance into a sprawling, moonlit garden that culminates at a grand cathedral plaza. It begins by passing through a stone archway illuminated by a warm wall lantern, transitioning from the enclosed passage into an open garden filled with trees and flowers. As the camera moves along a flower-lined dirt path under a starry sky, the scene expands to reveal a massive stone cathedral with domes on the right, flanked by white and purple blooms and scattered pathway lamps. The path then curves closer to the cathedral's towering walls, passing a stone bench and sculpted topiary bushes as warm light spills from the windows into the cool night. Finally, the movement opens into a paved plaza, gliding toward a circular fountain filled with water lilies that sits before the cathedral's grand entrance.
